personal.name: Abdullah Ibne Tayeb Tamur
personal.subtitle: AI Researcher | Medical AI | XAI | Federated Learning
personal.tagline: Architecting Intelligence That Heals: From Stethoscopes to Silicon.

about.narrative: First author on four IEEE-indexed publications, including CHD-Net (99.15% accuracy, Best Presenter Award, IEEE QPAIN 2026) and HemX (13,823 patients, TRIPOD+AI validated). Research spans medical AI, explainable AI (XAI), computer vision, federated learning, and privacy-preserving clinical systems—with a focus on clinically deployable, interpretable deep learning for real-world healthcare.

publications.title: HemX: Hierarchical XAI for Hematological Triage
publications.description: Explainable hematological triage framework validated across 13,823 patients from three countries. Integrates global SHAP, patient-level LIME, and a novel HHI biomarker for cross-site normalization. Validated under TRIPOD+AI guidelines.

publications.title: Fed-NeuroTriage: Federated Distillation Architecture for Psychiatric NLP
publications.description: Federated learning framework for psychiatric NLP triage (Bipolar vs. MDD) using MIMIC-IV discharge summaries under privacy-preserving constraints. Addresses 250:1 class imbalance via knowledge distillation.

publications.title: CMA-Fusion: Cross-Modal Attention Fusion for Alzheimer's Disease Detection
publications.description: Multimodal neuroimaging framework combining structural MRI and functional PET data via cross-modal attention fusion for early-stage Alzheimer's detection.

publications.title: DiaXAI-Stack: An Explainable AI Framework for Diabetes Prediction
publications.authors: Abdullah Ibne Tayeb Tamur (Fifth Author & Research Mentor)
publications.description: Mentored a junior CIS Lab team through dataset preprocessing, XAI methodology integration (SHAP/LIME), and end-to-end manuscript preparation and submission.

publications.title: CHD-Net: An Explainable Deep Learning Framework for Pediatric Congenital Heart Disease Classification
publications.description: Achieved 99.15% accuracy and 99.99% AUC via patient-level 5-fold CV with zero frame leakage. SHAP GradientExplainer applied for anatomical validation of IAS, IVS, and ductus arteriosus regions.

publications.title: Dual-Stream FreqViT: FFT and Vision Transformer Fusion for Robust Plant Disease Detection
publications.description: Dual-stream spatial CNN + 2D FFT spectral + Transformer encoder fusion. Achieved 97.75% accuracy under challenging field lighting conditions.

publications.title: FUSE SENet: Fusion with SE Attention Network for Robust Skin Lesion Classification
publications.description: Fusion-based feature learning with squeeze-and-excitation (SE) attention for skin lesion classification.

projects.title: HemaTriage
projects.shortDescription: Clinical web app for AI-powered blood count triage in resource-constrained healthcare settings.
projects.description: HemaTriage is a clinical web application built on the HemX architecture, designed for CPU-only hematological triage inference in resource-constrained healthcare settings. It enables real-world clinical deployment without requiring GPU hardware.
projects.details: The system ingests Complete Blood Count (CBC) parameters — WBC, RBC, Hemoglobin, Platelets, Neutrophils, Lymphocytes — and runs inference through a trained XGBoost + neural ensemble model based on the HemX research framework. XAI explanations via LIME are provided per-patient, showing which blood markers drove the triage decision (Dengue / Leukemia / Normal). Built for low-resource clinics in South Asia.

projects.title: SpectraLeaf Analytics
projects.shortDescription: Cloud-deployed plant disease detection using FFT + Vision Transformer dual-stream fusion.
projects.description: SpectraLeaf Analytics is a cloud-deployed plant disease detection application that combines spatial CNN features with FFT-based spectral representations for robust inference under challenging field lighting conditions.
projects.details: Based on the Dual-Stream FreqViT architecture (IEEE QPAIN 2026), the app processes leaf images through two parallel streams: a spatial CNN extracting texture features and a 2D FFT branch encoding frequency-domain disease signatures. Both are fused via a Transformer encoder. Achieves 97.75% accuracy across diverse field conditions. Deployed on Render cloud with Flask backend.

projects.title: Wolf Scholar
projects.shortDescription: Multimodal RAG research assistant using LangChain, FAISS, and Groq LLM for medical document analysis.
projects.description: Wolf Scholar is an autonomous multimodal RAG-based research assistant that uses LangChain orchestration, FAISS vector database, and Groq-accelerated LLM inference for multi-document analysis and medical vision diagnostic workflows.
projects.details: The system can ingest multiple PDFs (research papers, clinical guidelines), chunk and embed them into a FAISS vector store, then answer complex queries with cited references. Supports image-based medical inputs for diagnostic workflows. Built with an agent loop that can autonomously plan retrieval strategies, cross-reference documents, and synthesize multi-hop answers. Named Agent-Wolf internally.

projects.title: Autonomous FPV Drone
projects.shortDescription: Hands-on built hexacopter with Arduino & GPS for 1.5km autonomous navigation and real-time FPV video.
projects.description: A fully custom-engineered hexacopter drone built from scratch with Arduino flight controller, GPS module, and 5.8GHz FPV camera system. Achieves 1.5 km operational range with 20-minute flight time and real-time video transmission.
projects.details: Designed and assembled entirely by hand: custom integration of Arduino Mega, u-blox NEO-8M GPS, FlySky FS-i6 RF control system, and 5.8GHz analog FPV transmission. Implements a PID controller for autonomous waypoint navigation. Features live telemetry overlay including GPS coordinates, altitude, battery voltage, and RSSI signal strength. The hexacopter frame was custom-configured for stability and payload. Tested across multiple field missions in Chittagong Division, achieving 1.5km range and 20-minute endurance.

experience.description: Conducting applied research on Explainable AI, clinical diagnostic systems, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, and Dual-Mode LLM frameworks under formal NDA. Developing interpretable ML pipelines for healthcare applications with attention to clinical usability, privacy compliance, and deployment constraints.

Mentoring undergraduate researchers through the end-to-end publication pipeline: literature review, experimental design, model development, and manuscript preparation. Guided multiple teams toward IEEE conference submissions in PyTorch, computer vision, attention mechanisms, and XAI tools.
Operational and strategic leadership of a 45-member team alongside full-time academic and research activity. Overseeing operational analytics, resource allocation, and organizational development.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering
education.coursework: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Digital Image Processing, Computer Vision, Neural Networks & Fuzzy Systems, Pattern Recognition & Image Processing
education.thesis: Dual-Stream FreqViT: FFT and Vision Transformer Fusion for Robust Plant Disease Detection

education.institution: Lamabazar Asad Ali Sowdagar City Corporation High School
